001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.control;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.SetIDPSettingsResponse;
010
011/**
012 * Request message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.SetIDPSettingsResponse}, opCode -84, size 6
013 *
014 * <br>
015 *
016 * 
017 * <table border='1'>
018 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
019 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-84</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
020 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>6</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
021 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#REQUEST}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
022 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CONTROL}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
023 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>signed</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>true</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
024 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>response</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.SetIDPSettingsResponse}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
025 * </table>
026 */
027@MessageProps(
028    opCode=-84,
029    size=6,
030    type=MessageType.REQUEST,
031    characteristic=Characteristic.CONTROL,
032    signed=true,
033    response=SetIDPSettingsResponse.class
034)
035public class SetIDPSettingsRequest extends Message {
036
037    private int idpId;
038    private int profileIndex;
039    private int profileInsulinDuration;
040    private int profileCarbEntry;
041    private int changeTypeId;
042    private ChangeType changeType;
043
044    public SetIDPSettingsRequest() {}
045
046    /**
047     * @deprecated Use {@link #SetIDPSettingsRequest(int, int, int, int, ChangeType)} instead to pass the correct profileIndex.
048     */
049    @Deprecated
050    public SetIDPSettingsRequest(int idpId, int profileInsulinDuration, int profileCarbEntry, ChangeType changeType) {
051        this(idpId, 0, profileInsulinDuration, profileCarbEntry, changeType);
052    }
053
054    /**
055     * @param idpId the insulin delivery profile ID (NOT SLOT)
056     * @param profileIndex the slot index (0-5) of this profile in ProfileStatusResponse
057     */
058    public SetIDPSettingsRequest(int idpId, int profileIndex, int profileInsulinDuration, int profileCarbEntry, ChangeType changeType) {
059        this.cargo = buildCargo(idpId, profileIndex, profileInsulinDuration, profileCarbEntry, changeType.id);
060        this.idpId = idpId;
061        this.profileIndex = profileIndex;
062        this.profileInsulinDuration = profileInsulinDuration;
063        this.profileCarbEntry = profileCarbEntry;
064        this.changeTypeId = changeType.id;
065        this.changeType = getChangeType();
066
067    }
068
069    /**
070     * <table border="1">
071     * <caption>Parsed fields for SetIDPSettingsRequest:</caption>
072     * <tr><td><code>idpId</code></td><td><code>raw[0]</code></td></tr>
073     * <tr><td><code>profileIndex</code></td><td><code>raw[1]</code></td></tr>
074     * <tr><td><code>profileInsulinDuration</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 2)</code></td></tr>
075     * <tr><td><code>profileCarbEntry</code></td><td><code>raw[4]</code></td></tr>
076     * <tr><td><code>changeTypeId</code></td><td><code>raw[5]</code></td></tr>
077     * <tr><td><code>changeType</code></td><td><code>getChangeType()</code></td></tr>
078     * </table>
079     */
080    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
081        raw = this.removeSignedRequestHmacBytes(raw);
082        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
083        this.cargo = raw;
084        this.idpId = raw[0];
085        this.profileIndex = raw[1];
086        this.profileInsulinDuration = Bytes.readShort(raw, 2);
087        this.profileCarbEntry = raw[4];
088        this.changeTypeId = raw[5];
089        this.changeType = getChangeType();
090
091    }
092
093
094    /**
095     * <table border="1">
096     * <caption>Byte layout for SetIDPSettingsRequest.buildCargo(...):</caption>
097     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
098     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>new byte[]{(byte) idpId} [element 0]</code></td></tr>
099     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>new byte[]{(byte) profileIndex} [element 1]</code></td></tr>
100     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(profileInsulinDuration) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
101     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(profileInsulinDuration) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
102     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>new byte[]{(byte) profileCarbEntry} [element 0]</code></td></tr>
103     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>new byte[]{(byte) changeTypeId} [element 1]</code></td></tr>
104     * </table>
105     */
106    public static byte[] buildCargo(int idpId, int profileIndex, int profileInsulinDuration, int profileCarbEntry, int changeTypeId) {
107        return Bytes.combine(
108            new byte[] {(byte) idpId, (byte) profileIndex},
109            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(profileInsulinDuration),
110            new byte[]{ (byte) profileCarbEntry, (byte) changeTypeId }
111        );
112    }
113
114    public int getChangeTypeId() {
115        return changeTypeId;
116    }
117
118    public int getIdpId() {
119        return idpId;
120    }
121
122    public int getProfileIndex() {
123        return profileIndex;
124    }
125
126    public enum ChangeType {
127        CHANGE_INSULIN_DURATION(1),
128        CHANGE_CARB_ENTRY(4),
129
130        ;
131
132        private final int id;
133        ChangeType(int id) {
134            this.id = id;
135        }
136
137        public static ChangeType fromId(int id) {
138            for (ChangeType type : values()) {
139                if (type.id == id) {
140                    return type;
141                }
142            }
143            return null;
144        }
145    }
146
147    public ChangeType getChangeType() {
148        return ChangeType.fromId(changeTypeId);
149    }
150
151    public int getProfileInsulinDuration() {
152        return profileInsulinDuration;
153    }
154    public int getProfileCarbEntry() {
155        return profileCarbEntry;
156    }
157    
158    
159}
